# LEF Climbing

> Indoor climbing gym in Lexington, Kentucky. Bouldering, top-rope, lead, and auto-belay. Day passes are by reservation only.

## Location & contact

- Address: 916 N Broadway, Lexington, KY 40505
- Phone: 859-523-0518
- Email: info@lefclimbing.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 12pm–9pm, Sat 12pm–8pm, Sun 12pm–8pm (members-only 10am–12pm daily)
- Areas served: Lexington, Nicholasville, Georgetown, Versailles, Richmond, Frankfort

## Services

- [Bouldering](https://www.lefclimbing.com/about#bouldering): Indoor bouldering walls with padded floors. No ropes, no harnesses, no partner required.
- [Top-rope, auto-belay & lead](https://www.lefclimbing.com/about#ropes): Roped climbing on tall walls. Top-rope needs a belay partner; auto-belays don't. Lead climbing for advanced climbers.
- [Yoga](https://www.lefclimbing.com/about): A regular yoga schedule for stretching, mobility, and recovery.

## Programs & instruction

- [Booking](https://www.lefclimbing.com/booking): Classes, youth clubs, private instruction, and group events (birthday parties, scouts, corporate, workshops). Class list at https://portal.lefclimbing.com/lef/n/classes.
- [Memberships](https://www.lefclimbing.com/membership): Memberships with full facility access. Buy at https://portal.lefclimbing.com/lef/n/memberships.
- [Day pass / climb with us](https://www.lefclimbing.com/climb-with-us): Reserve a day pass at https://portal.lefclimbing.com/lef/programs/day-pass-lef.
- [Events calendar](https://www.lefclimbing.com/calendar): Live week-view of classes, youth clubs, member events, yoga, Boulder League, and summer camps. Register through the portal.
- [Waiver](https://portal.lefclimbing.com/lef/agreements/lef-waiver): Sign before climbing.

## Site

- Home: https://www.lefclimbing.com/
- About: https://www.lefclimbing.com/about

- Membership: https://www.lefclimbing.com/membership
- Calendar: https://www.lefclimbing.com/calendar
- Contact: https://www.lefclimbing.com/contact
- Climb With Us: https://www.lefclimbing.com/climb-with-us
- Sitemap: https://www.lefclimbing.com/sitemap.xml
